Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}...I remember you. You're the one who was playing with that elementary school girl.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Her face shone with the warm light of new life.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}...And then there's me, cooped up in the hospital, struggling to breathe.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I'm just a faint glimmer compared to her dazzling light.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Misery is a harsh mistress.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I feel as though I'm lying in an unyielding darkness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}...Liar. And if you're not lying, then you're just ignorant.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}I have an incurable hereditary disease.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Unless you're in my situation, you can't understand how I feel.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 117 2 25 25}...But I prefer it that way. I wouldn't wish this on anyone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 117 0 25 25}There are no platitudes to stave off death...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Sorry about that. I didn't mean to depress you or anything.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}It's been quite a while since I spoke to someone my own age.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}...It's only natural for those dwelling in the depths of darkness to yearn for the light.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 117 1 25 25}I'm glad we could meet, though. If there is a god, I'll be able to thank him soon enough.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I've become acquainted with Akinari Kamiki.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 117 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}This was just a chance encounter. Nothing more.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Kamiki,[n]then headed back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
